statement: In every magma, Equation 2434 (`x = (y * (z * (w * w))) * u`) implies Equation 2002 (`x = (y * (z * z)) * (z * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0323
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op w w))) u)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y (op z z)) (op z z))
